remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Choose target creature card in your graveyard
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Return target creature card and up to one target Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, or Wizard card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

params.Description: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature in your party. (Your party consists of up to one each of Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, and Wizard.)
